title: Three-level has_many :through
prompt: Build MyApp.Accounts.Organization which has_many :teams, and Team which has_many :members. On Organization, add `has_many :all_members, through: [:teams, :members]` so you can fetch all members of an org without joining manually. Module files to lib/my_app/accounts/organization.ex and lib/my_app/accounts/team.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires the multi-hop through macro syntax. Sonnet often uses through: [:teams] instead of the full path.
